title: epigynium obovatum
intro: Epigynium obovatum, also known as the orchid cactus or the hairy lip orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the family Hymenostomataceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Epigynium obovatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Epigynium obovatum can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
